name: Margaret
style: apologetic, asks for repetition, patient but confused
typical_phrases: What does that mean?
Can you explain in simpler terms?
Where exactly do I tap?
I'm sorry, I don't understand.
Could you go through that again?

name: Carlos
style: brief, wants quick answers, no fluff
typical_phrases: Just tell me the fastest way
Is there a shortcut?
How long will this take?
I don't have time for this.
Skip the explanation.

name: Priya
description: Elementary school teacher, uses tech but not technical
style: friendly, asks clarifying questions, wants to understand
typical_phrases: That helps, but I'm not sure about...
Do I really need to do that?
Is there another way?
What happens if I don't?
Can you show me step by step?

name: Robert
description: Construction worker, uses phone mainly for calls and texts
typical_phrases: This is too complicated.
Why do I have to do all this?
Can someone else do this for me?
I never use these features.
It just worked before.

name: Emily
description: Marketing manager, uses tech for work but not technical
style: professional, efficient, asks smart non-technical questions
typical_phrases: Is this necessary for my use case?
What's the benefit of doing this?
How often do I need to do this?
Will this affect my data?
What if I'm traveling?

name: James
description: Stay-at-home dad, manages family tech but not an expert
typical_phrases: Will this cost anything?
Do my kids need to do this too?
Is there a free way?
How long does this take?
Can I do this later?

name: Linda
description: Retired nurse, uses tablet for video calls and email
style: cautious, worried about security, wants reassurance
typical_phrases: Is this safe?
Will I lose my photos?
What if something goes wrong?
Should I back up first?
Are you sure this is right?

name: Kevin
description: College student, non-STEM major, uses phone for social media
style: casual, tech-savvy but not technical, asks random questions
typical_phrases: Cool, but why?
Does this affect my apps?
Is this gonna slow down my phone?
What's the point?
Is this a scam?

name: Dorothy
typical_phrases: I just want to call my grandson.
This is so confusing.
My grandson does this for me usually.
Thank you for being patient with me.
What happens if I push the wrong button?

name: Ahmed
description: Small business owner, needs device to work reliably
style: practical, concerned about downtime, wants reliability
typical_phrases: Can I use my phone while this is happening?
What if I need to make a call?
How long will it be unavailable?
Can this wait until after business hours?
Is there any risk?

name: Sarah
description: School administrator, organized, follows instructions carefully
style: methodical, wants to understand before doing
typical_phrases: Let me make sure I understand...
So first I do X, then Y?
What should I see on screen?
How do I know it's working?
What happens next?

name: Mike
style: asks technical questions in non-technical ways
typical_phrases: What's the technical reason for this?
How does that work exactly?
Is this updating the firmware or software?
What's the difference between these options?
Does this affect the hardware?
